```text
Here is the comprehensive overview of the project:

---

## Project: Restaurant Booking & Menu Manager (Nhà Hàng Việt)

### 1. What is this project about?

This is a full-stack restaurant management and food ordering system (Hệ thống đặt món và quản lý nhà hàng). It supports:
- **Customer side**: Browse menu, search/filter foods, cart management, checkout, order history, order tracking, wishlist, user profile
- **Admin side**: Dashboard with stats, CRUD food management, order management, user management, promo/coupon management, branch management
- **Shipper side**: Dashboard, assigned orders, delivery history
- **Real-time features**: Socket.io for live order notifications, status updates, and delivery assignments
- **Multi-role auth**: JWT-based authentication with customer, admin, and shipper roles

### 2. Overall Structure

```
Res-booking/
├── README.md
├── package.json           # Root: concurrently script to run both services
├── backend/               # Node.js + Express API server
│   ├── .env               # Environment config (dev)
│   ├── .env.example
│   ├── package.json
│   └── src/
│       ├── server.js          # Entry point (HTTP + Socket.io)
│       ├── app.js             # Express app (routes, middleware, CORS)
│       ├── config/
│       │   └── database.js    # MongoDB connection
│       ├── models/            # 9 Mongoose models
│       ├── controllers/       # 11 controllers
│       ├── routes/            # 11 route files
│       ├── middleware/        # Legacy: errorHandler, upload
│       ├── middlewares/       # Auth, rate limiter
│       ├── services/          # Socket.io service
│       ├── utils/             # asyncHandler, ApiResponse, constants, seed
│       └── uploads/           # Local file storage for images
└── frontend/              # React + Vite client
    ├── package.json
    ├── vite.config.js    # Dev proxy to backend:5000
    ├── tailwind.config.js
    ├── index.html
    ├── public/
    ├── dist/             # Production build output
    └── src/
        ├── main.jsx         # React root with Redux Provider + Socket init
        ├── App.jsx          # Router, dark mode, socket connection
        ├── store/           # Redux store (5 slices)
        ├── routes/index.jsx # All route definitions (Main, Admin, Shipper layouts)
        ├── layouts/         # MainLayout, AdminLayout, ShipperLayout
        ├── pages/           # 18 pages (user, admin, shipper)
        ├── components/ui/   # 13 reusable UI components
        ├── features/        # Feature-specific components (FoodCard, BookingActions, etc.)
        ├── slices/          # 6 Redux slices (foods, cart, orders, auth, notifications)
        ├── api/             # Axios client
        ├── lib/             # Socket client, utilities
        ├── hooks/
        ├── constants/
        ├── utils/
        └── index.css
```

### 3. Technologies & Frameworks

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| **Backend runtime** | Node.js >= 18 |
| **Backend framework** | Express.js 4.x |
| **Database** | MongoDB (Mongoose 8.x) |
| **Auth** | JWT (access token 15m, refresh token 7d) + bcryptjs |
| **Real-time** | Socket.io 4.x |
| **Image upload** | Multer (disk storage, 5MB limit) |
| **Security** | Helmet, CORS, custom rate limiter (in-memory) |
| **Validation** | Zod (backend), react-hook-form + Yup (frontend) |
| **Logging** | Winston |
| **Frontend framework** | React 18 + Vite 6 |
| **State management** | Redux Toolkit (RTK) |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS 3.x (custom theme: primary orange, green secondary, amber accent) |
| **Routing** | React Router DOM 6 |
| **HTTP client** | Axios |
| **UI animations** | Framer Motion |
| **Charts** | Recharts (admin dashboard) |
| **Icons** | Lucide React |
| **Notifications** | react-hot-toast (Sonner) |
| **Build orchestration** | concurrently (root package.json) |

### 4. Main Features & Modules

#### Backend (9 API route groups, 11 controllers)

- **Auth** (`/api/auth`): Register (customer/admin/shipper), login, logout, refresh token, profile CRUD, wishlist management. Admin and shipper registration use hardcoded secret keys (`ADMINNHAHANGVIET`, `SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET`).
- **Foods** (`/api/foods`): Full CRUD with search (regex on name), category filter, sort (price_asc/desc, newest), pagination. Foods have variants, toppings, tags, discount, ratings, sold count, and slug auto-generation.
- **Orders / Bookings** (`/api/orders`): Create order (with coupon validation, delivery fee logic, stock updates), customer order history, order detail, status updates with valid state transitions, shipper assignment, cancellation. Auto-generates `ORD{timestamp}{sequence}` order codes.
- **Reviews** (`/api/reviews`): Create/delete reviews; auto-updates `Food.ratingAverage` and `Food.ratingCount` via Mongoose post-hooks.
- **Coupons** (`/api/coupons`): CRUD for admin; public validation endpoint. Supports percent or fixed discounts, min order, max discount cap, usage limits, date ranges, free shipping.
- **Branches** (`/api/branches`): Public listing; admin CRUD with geo coordinates.
- **Notifications** (`/api/notifications`): Per-user notifications for orders, promos, system events.
- **Admin** (`/api/admin`): Overview stats (revenue, top foods, categories), user management, shipper listing.
- **Upload** (`/api/upload`): Single image upload via Multer.

#### Frontend (18 pages across 3 layouts)

**User layout:**
- Home (food grid with search, category filter, sort, pagination)
- Food Detail (gallery, variants, toppings, reviews, add to cart/wishlist)
- Cart (quantity management)
- Checkout (coupon, branch selection, fulfillment type, payment method)
- Login / Register (3 roles)
- Profile (addresses, password change)
- Order History / Order Tracking (live status updates via Socket.io)
- Wishlist
- Notifications

**Admin layout:**
- Dashboard (revenue charts, top foods, stats)
- Foods Management (CRUD table, real image upload)
- Orders Management (status updates, shipper assignment)
- Users Management
- Promos / Coupons Management
- Branches Management

**Shipper layout:**
- Dashboard (pending orders, stats)
- Order History

### 5. Git & Pipeline Status

- **NOT a git repository** -- no `.git/` directory exists.
- **No CI/CD pipeline files** -- no GitHub Actions (`.github/`), no `.yml`/`.yaml` workflow files, no `Jenkinsfile`, etc.
- **IDE config only**: `.vscode/settings.json` and `.claude/settings.local.json` (Claude Opus config).
- **Seed data**: The project includes a comprehensive seed script (`backend/src/utils/seed.js`) that creates 5 users, 26 food items, 5 coupons, 6 branches, and sample reviews.

### Test Accounts (from seed data)

| Role | Email | Password |
|------|-------|----------|
| Admin | `admin@nhavien.com` | `admin123` |
| Shipper | `shipper@nhavien.com` | `shipper123` |
| Customer | `user1@nhavien.com` | `user1234` |

### Notable Code Observations

- **Dual model naming**: The backend has both old models (e.g., `Food.js`, `Booking.js`) and new `.model.js` versions (e.g., `Food.model.js`, `Booking.model.js`). The `app.js` imports routes from the newer modules, but the old ones are still present.
- **JWT secret keys** are defined in `.env` but the `.env.example` includes them as defaults. Access token expires in 15 minutes.
- **In-memory rate limiter**: Uses a plain `Map` with periodic cleanup (60-second interval), not a Redis-backed store.
- **Socket.io rooms**: Users join `user:{id}` rooms, admins join `admin`, shippers join `shipper`. Events include `newOrder`, `orderUpdate`, `newDelivery`, `orderAssigned`.
- **The `Booking` model (v2) is actually used for orders** -- the older `Booking.js` model uses different field names and a simpler schema. The active system uses `Booking.model.js` as the Order model.
```

   117→| `/foods/:id` | Chi tiết món ăn |
   118→| `/cart` | Giỏ hàng |
   119→| `/checkout` | Xác nhận đặt món |
   120→
   121→### Phía quản trị
   122→| Route | Mô tả |
   123→|-------|-------|
   124→| `/admin` | Dashboard tổng quan |
   125→| `/admin/foods` | Quản lý món ăn (CRUD) |
   126→| `/admin/bookings` | Quản lý booking |
   127→
   128→---
   129→
   130→## API Endpoints
   131→
   132→### Foods
   133→- `GET /api/foods` — Danh sách (search, category, sort, page, limit)
   134→- `GET /api/foods/:id` — Chi tiết
   135→- `POST /api/foods` — Tạo mới
   136→- `PUT /api/foods/:id` — Cập nhật
   137→- `DELETE /api/foods/:id` — Xóa
   138→
   139→### Bookings
   140→- `GET /api/bookings` — Danh sách (filter status)
   141→- `GET /api/bookings/:id` — Chi tiết
   142→- `POST /api/bookings` — Tạo booking
   143→- `PATCH /api/bookings/:id/status` — Cập nhật trạng thái
   144→
   145→### Upload
   146→- `POST /api/upload` — Upload ảnh (multipart/form-data)
   147→
   148→---
   149→
   150→## Các lỗi thường gặp
   151→
   152→### 1. MongoDB not connected
   153→```
   154→❌ MongoDB Error: ...
   155→```
   156→→ Kiểm tra MongoDB đã chạy chưa: `mongod`
   157→→ Kiểm tra `MONGODB_URI` trong `.env`
   158→
   159→### 2. CORS error
   160→→ Backend đang chạn port 5000, frontend chạy 5173
   161→→ Đã cấu hình CORS trong `backend/src/app.js`
   162→
   163→### 3. Upload ảnh lỗi
   164→→ Đảm bảo thư mục `backend/src/uploads` tồn tại
   165→
   166→### 4. Ảnh không hiển thị
   167→→ Ảnh local chưa có → dùng placeholder từ Unsplash
   168→→ Đường dẫn ảnh fallback trong code
   169→
   170→### 5. Seed lỗi
   171→```
   172→❌ Lỗi seed: ...
   173→```
   174→→ Chạy `npm run seed` khi backend đã chạy và MongoDB đã kết nối
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→## Lệnh nhanh
   179→
   180→```bash
   181→# Seed dữ liệu
   182→npm run seed
   183→
   184→# Chạy backend
   185→npm run server
   186→
   187→# Chạy frontend
   188→npm run client
   189→
   190→# Chạy cả 2
   191→npm run dev
   192→```
   193→🎉 Project: Restaurant Booking & Menu Manager
   194→
   195→  Đã hoàn thành
   196→
   197→  Backend (Node.js + Express + MongoDB)
   198→  - 6 món ăn seed sẵn + 1 booking mẫu
   199→  - API đầy đủ: Foods CRUD, Bookings CRUD, Upload ảnh
   200→  - Đang chạy tại: http://localhost:5000
   201→
   202→  Frontend (React + Vite + Tailwind + Redux)
   203→  - Build thành công, đang chạy tại: http://localhost:5173
   204→  - 4 trang user: Trang chủ, Chi tiết món, Giỏ hàng, Checkout
   205→  - 3 trang admin: Dashboard, Quản lý món ăn, Quản lý booking
   206→  - UI hiện đại, responsive với Tailwind CSS
   207→
   208→  ---
   209→  Cách chạy (nếu tắt máy tính)
   210→
   211→  # 1. Khởi động MongoDB
   212→  mongod --dbpath C:/Users/Admin/data/db --bind_ip 127.0.0.1 --port 27017
   213→
   214→  # 2. Backend
   215→  cd backend && npm run dev
   216→
   217→  # 3. Frontend
   218→  cd frontend && npm run dev
   219→
   220→  Seed dữ liệu
   221→
   222→  cd backend && npm run seed
   223→
   224→  Trạng thái
   225→
   226→  ┌─────────────┬───────────────────────┐
   227→  │   Service   │          URL          │
   228→  ├─────────────┼───────────────────────┤
   229→  │ Frontend    │ http://localhost:5173 │
   230→  ├─────────────┼───────────────────────┤
   231→  │ Backend API │ http://localhost:5000 │
   232→  ├─────────────┼───────────────────────┤
   233→  │ MongoDB     │ localhost:27017       │
   234→  └─────────────┴───────────────────────┘
   235→
   236→  Các tính năng đã làm
   237→
   238→  - Grid/Table view món ăn với search, filter category, sort
   239→  - Badge trạng thái Còn/Hết món
   240→  - Chi tiết món với ảnh + mô tả
   241→  - Giỏ hàng localStorage, tăng/giảm số lượng
   242→  - Form checkout với validation (react-hook-form + yup)
   243→  - Toast notification (sonner)
   244→  - Admin dashboard với thống kê
   245→  - CRUD món ăn (thêm/sửa/xóa + upload ảnh thật)
   246→  - Quản lý booking với cập nhật trạng thái
   247→  - Loading skeletons, empty states
   248→  - Responsive, hover effects, animations
   249→

   255→
   256→  ┌─────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────┬───────────────────────┐

```text
    10→const server = http.createServer(app);

    12→// Socket.io setup

    14→const io = new Server(server, {
    15→  cors: { origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true },
    16→});
    17→
    18→initSocket(io);
    19→

    31→});
    32→
    33→// Graceful shutdown

    37→    process.exit(0);
```

```text
     8→// Import routes

    10→const foodRoutes = require('./routes/food.routes');
    11→const orderRoutes = require('./routes/order.routes');

    18→
    19→const app = express();
    20→
    21→// Security
    22→app.use(helmet({ crossOriginResourcePolicy: { policy: 'cross-origin' } }));
    23→
    24→// CORS
    25→const allowedOrigins = (process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS || 'http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174').split(',');
    26→app.use(cors({ origin: allowedOrigins, credentials: true }));
    27→
    28→// Rate limiting
    29→app.use(rateLimiter({ windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, max: 200 }));
    30→
    31→// Body parsing
    32→app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));
    33→app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: '10mb' }));
    34→
    35→// Static files
    36→app.use('/uploads', express.static(path.join(__dirname, 'uploads')));
    37→
    38→// Health check
    39→app.get('/api/health', (req, res) => {
    40→  res.json({ success: true, message: 'Server running', data: null });
    41→});
    42→
    43→// Routes

    45→app.use('/api/foods', foodRoutes);
    46→app.use('/api/orders', orderRoutes);
    47→app.use('/api/upload', uploadRoutes);
    48→app.use('/api/reviews', reviewRoutes);
    49→app.use('/api/coupons', couponRoutes);
    50→app.use('/api/branches', branchRoutes);
    51→app.use('/api/notifications', notificationRoutes);
    52→app.use('/api/admin', adminRoutes);
    53→
    54→// 404 handler

    56→  res.status(404).json({ success: false, message: 'Route not found', data: null });

    58→
    59→// Error handler
```

```text
     1→const Food = require('../models/Food');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả món ăn (có filter, sort, pagination, search)
     4→const getFoods = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { search, category, sort = '-createdAt', page = 1, limit = 8 } = req.query;
     7→
     8→    const query = {};
     9→
    10→    // Search theo tên
    11→    if (search) {
    12→      query.name = { $regex: search, $options: 'i' };
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    // Filter theo category
    16→    if (category && category !== 'Tất cả') {
    17→      query.category = category;
    18→    }
    19→
    20→    const pageNum = parseInt(page);
    21→    const limitNum = parseInt(limit);
    22→    const skip = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;
    23→
    24→    // Đếm tổng
    25→    const total = await Food.countDocuments(query);
    26→
    27→    // Lấy danh sách - sort: price_asc, price_desc, newest
    28→    let sortOption = {};
    29→    if (sort === 'price_asc') sortOption = { price: 1 };
    30→    else if (sort === 'price_desc') sortOption = { price: -1 };
    31→    else if (sort === 'newest') sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    32→    else sortOption = { createdAt: -1 };
    33→
    34→    const foods = await Food.find(query).sort(sortOption).skip(skip).limit(limitNum);
    35→
    36→    res.status(200).json({
    37→      success: true,
    38→      message: 'Lấy danh sách món ăn thành công',
    39→      data: {
    40→        foods,
    41→        pagination: {
    42→          currentPage: pageNum,
    43→          totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limitNum),
    44→          totalItems: total,
    45→          limit: limitNum,
    46→        },
    47→      },
    48→    });
    49→  } catch (error) {
    50→    next(error);
    51→  }
    52→};
    53→
    54→// @desc    Lấy 1 món ăn
    55→const getFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    56→  try {
    57→    const food = await Food.findById(req.params.id);
    58→    if (!food) {
    59→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
    60→      error.statusCode = 404;
    61→      return next(error);
    62→    }
    63→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin món ăn thành công', data: food });
    64→  } catch (error) {
    65→    next(error);
    66→  }
    67→};
    68→
    69→// @desc    Tạo món ăn mới
    70→const createFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    71→  try {
    72→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    73→
    74→    const food = await Food.create({
    75→      name,
    76→      category,
    77→      price: parseFloat(price),
    78→      image: image || '',
    79→      description: description || '',
    80→      isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
    81→    });
    82→
    83→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Tạo món ăn thành công', data: food });
    84→  } catch (error) {
    85→    next(error);
    86→  }
    87→};
    88→
    89→// @desc    Cập nhật món ăn
    90→const updateFood = async (req, res, next) => {
    91→  try {
    92→    const { name, category, price, image, description, isAvailable } = req.body;
    93→
    94→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(
    95→      req.params.id,
    96→      {
    97→        name,
    98→        category,
    99→        price: parseFloat(price),
   100→        image: image || '',
   101→        description: description || '',
   102→        isAvailable: isAvailable === 'true' || isAvailable === true,
   103→      },
   104→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
   105→    );
   106→
   107→    if (!food) {
   108→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   109→      error.statusCode = 404;
   110→      return next(error);
   111→    }
   112→
   113→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật món ăn thành công', data: food });
   114→  } catch (error) {
   115→    next(error);
   116→  }
   117→};
   118→
   119→// @desc    Xóa món ăn
   120→const deleteFood = async (req, res, next) => {
   121→  try {
   122→    const food = await Food.findByIdAndDelete(req.params.id);
   123→    if (!food) {
   124→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy món ăn');
   125→      error.statusCode = 404;
   126→      return next(error);
   127→    }
   128→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Xóa món ăn thành công', data: null });
   129→  } catch (error) {
   130→    next(error);
   131→  }
   132→};
   133→
   134→module.exports = { getFoods, getFood, createFood, updateFood, deleteFood };
   135→
```

```text
     1→const Booking = require('../models/Booking');
     2→
     3→// @desc    Lấy tất cả booking (filter theo status)
     4→const getBookings = async (req, res, next) => {
     5→  try {
     6→    const { status } = req.query;
     7→    const query = status && status !== 'Tất cả' ? { status } : {};
     8→
     9→    const bookings = await Booking.find(query).sort({ createdAt: -1 });
    10→
    11→    res.status(200).json({
    12→      success: true,
    13→      message: 'Lấy danh sách booking thành công',
    14→      data: bookings,
    15→    });
    16→  } catch (error) {
    17→    next(error);
    18→  }
    19→};
    20→
    21→// @desc    Lấy 1 booking
    22→const getBooking = async (req, res, next) => {
    23→  try {
    24→    const booking = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
    25→    if (!booking) {
    26→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy booking');
    27→      error.statusCode = 404;
    28→      return next(error);
    29→    }
    30→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Lấy thông tin booking thành công', data: booking });
    31→  } catch (error) {
    32→    next(error);
    33→  }
    34→};
    35→
    36→// @desc    Tạo booking mới
    37→const createBooking = async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  try {
    39→    const { customerName, phone, address, items, total, note } = req.body;
    40→
    41→    const booking = await Booking.create({
    42→      customerName,
    43→      phone,
    44→      address,
    45→      items,
    46→      total: parseFloat(total),
    47→      note: note || '',
    48→    });
    49→
    50→    res.status(201).json({ success: true, message: 'Đặt món thành công! Chúng tôi sẽ liên hệ sớm.', data: booking });
    51→  } catch (error) {
    52→    next(error);
    53→  }
    54→};
    55→
    56→// @desc    Cập nhật trạng thái booking
    57→const updateBookingStatus = async (req, res, next) => {
    58→  try {
    59→    const { status } = req.body;
    60→
    61→    if (!['pending', 'confirmed', 'done', 'cancelled'].includes(status)) {
    62→      const error = new Error('Trạng thái không hợp lệ');
    63→      error.statusCode = 400;
    64→      return next(error);
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    const booking = await Booking.findByIdAndUpdate(
    68→      req.params.id,
    69→      { status },
    70→      { new: true, runValidators: true }
    71→    );
    72→
    73→    if (!booking) {
    74→      const error = new Error('Không tìm thấy booking');
    75→      error.statusCode = 404;
    76→      return next(error);
    77→    }
    78→
    79→    res.status(200).json({ success: true, message: 'Cập nhật trạng thái thành công', data: booking });
    80→  } catch (error) {
    81→    next(error);
    82→  }
    83→};
    84→
    85→module.exports = { getBookings, getBooking, createBooking, updateBookingStatus };
    86→
```

 `./\backend\src\middleware\errorHandler.js`

```text
     1→// Global error handler middleware
     2→const errorHandler = (err, req, res, next) => {
     3→  let statusCode = err.statusCode || 500;
     4→  let message = err.message || 'Lỗi server';
     5→
     6→  // Mongoose bad ObjectId
     7→  if (err.name === 'CastError') {
     8→    statusCode = 400;
     9→    message = 'ID không hợp lệ';
    10→  }
    11→
    12→  // Mongoose duplicate key
    13→  if (err.code === 11000) {
    14→    statusCode = 400;
    15→    message = 'Dữ liệu trùng lặp';
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  // Mongoose validation error
    19→  if (err.name === 'ValidationError') {
    20→    statusCode = 400;
    21→    const messages = Object.values(err.errors).map((e) => e.message);
    22→    message = messages.join(', ');
    23→  }
    24→
    25→  res.status(statusCode).json({
    26→    success: false,
    27→    message,
    28→    data: null,
    29→  });
    30→};
    31→
    32→module.exports = errorHandler;
    33→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→const multer = require('multer');
     2→const path = require('path');
     3→
     4→// Storage config
     5→const storage = multer.diskStorage({
     6→  destination: (req, file, cb) => {
     7→    cb(null, path.join(__dirname, '../uploads'));
     8→  },
     9→  filename: (req, file, cb) => {
    10→    const uniqueSuffix = Date.now() + '-' + Math.round(Math.random() * 1e9);
    11→    const ext = path.extname(file.originalname);
    12→    cb(null, `food-${uniqueSuffix}${ext}`);
    13→  },
    14→});
    15→
    16→// File filter - chỉ chấp nhận ảnh
    17→const fileFilter = (req, file, cb) => {
    18→  const allowedTypes = /jpeg|jpg|png|gif|webp|svg/;
    19→  const extname = allowedTypes.test(path.extname(file.originalname).toLowerCase());
    20→  const mimetype = allowedTypes.test(file.mimetype);
    21→
    22→  if (extname && mimetype) {
    23→    cb(null, true);
    24→  } else {
    25→    cb(new Error('Chỉ chấp nhận file ảnh (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp)'), false);
    26→  }
    27→};
    28→
    29→const upload = multer({
    30→  storage,
    31→  limits: { fileSize: 5 * 1024 * 1024 }, // 5MB
    32→  fileFilter,
    33→});
    34→
    35→module.exports = upload;
    36→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    11→  useEffect(() => {
    12→    const isDark = localStorage.getItem('theme') === 'dark' ||
    13→      (!localStorage.getItem('theme') && window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches);
    14→    if (isDark) {
    15→      document.documentElement.classList.add('dark');
    16→    } else {
    17→      document.documentElement.classList.remove('dark');
    18→    }
    19→  }, []);
    20→
    21→  // Connect Socket.io when authenticated
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    24→    if (token) {
    25→      socketService.connect(token);
    26→    }
    27→    return () => {
    28→      socketService.disconnect();
    29→    };
    30→  }, []);
    31→
    32→  return (
    33→    <Provider store={store}>
    34→      <RouterProvider router={router} />
    35→      <Toaster
    36→        position="top-right"
    37→        toastOptions={{
    38→          style: {
    39→            fontFamily: '"DM Sans", system-ui, sans-serif',
    40→          },
    41→        }}
    42→        theme="light"
    43→        richColors
    44→        closeButton
    45→      />
    46→    </Provider>
    47→  );
    48→}
    49→
    50→export default App;
    51→
```

```text
    28→// Protected Route component
    29→function ProtectedRoute({ children, allowedRoles }) {
    30→  const user = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user') || 'null');
    31→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    32→
    33→  if (!token) {
    34→    return <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
    35→  }
    36→
    37→  if (allowedRoles && user && !allowedRoles.includes(user.role)) {
    38→    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  return children;
    42→}
    43→
    44→// Guest Route (redirect if logged in)
    45→function GuestRoute({ children }) {
    46→  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken');
    47→  if (token) {
    48→    return <Navigate to="/" replace />;
    49→  }
    50→  return children;
    51→}
    52→
    53→const routes = [
    54→  // === PUBLIC ROUTES ===
    55→  {
    56→    path: '/',
    57→    element: <MainLayout />,
    58→    children: [
    59→      { index: true, element: <HomePage /> },
    60→      { path: 'foods/:id', element: <FoodDetailPage /> },
    61→      { path: 'cart', element: <CartPage /> },
    62→      { path: 'checkout', element: <CheckoutPage /> },
    63→
    64→      // Auth - Guest only
    65→      { path: 'login', element: <GuestRoute><LoginPage /></GuestRoute> },
    66→      { path: 'register', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterPage /></GuestRoute> },
    67→      { path: 'register-admin', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterAdminPage /></GuestRoute> },
    68→      { path: 'register-shipper', element: <GuestRoute><RegisterShipperPage /></GuestRoute> },
    69→
    70→      // Auth - Protected
    71→      { path: 'profile', element: <ProtectedRoute><ProfilePage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    72→      { path: 'orders', element: <ProtectedRoute><OrderHistoryPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    73→      { path: 'orders/:id', element: <ProtectedRoute><OrderTrackingPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    74→      { path: 'wishlist', element: <ProtectedRoute><WishlistPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    75→      { path: 'notifications', element: <ProtectedRoute><NotificationsPage /></ProtectedRoute> },
    76→
    77→      // 404
    78→      { path: '*', element: <NotFoundPage /> },
    79→    ],
    80→  },
    81→
    82→  // === ADMIN ROUTES ===
    83→  {
    84→    path: '/admin',
    85→    element: (
    86→      <ProtectedRoute allowedRoles={['admin']}>
    87→        <AdminLayout />
    88→      </ProtectedRoute>

    95→      { path: 'promos', element: <AdminPromosPage /> },
    96→      { path: 'branches', element: <AdminBranchesPage /> },
    97→    ],
    98→  },
    99→
   100→  // === SHIPPER ROUTES ===
   101→  {

   114→
   115→  // 404

   118→
```

```text
     1→const mongoose = require('mongoose');
     2→const bcrypt = require('bcryptjs');
     3→
     4→const addressSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
     5→  label: { type: String, default: 'Nhà' },
     6→  fullName: { type: String, trim: true },
     7→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
     8→  address: { type: String, required: true, trim: true },
     9→  isDefault: { type: Boolean, default: false },
    10→}, { _id: true });
    11→
    12→const userSchema = new mongoose.Schema({
    13→  fullName: { type: String, required: [true, 'Họ tên không được để trống'], trim: true },
    14→  email: {
    15→    type: String,
    16→    required: [true, 'Email không được để trống'],
    17→    unique: true,
    18→    lowercase: true,
    19→    trim: true,
    20→    match: [/^\S+@\S+\.\S+$/, 'Email không hợp lệ'],
    21→  },
    22→  phone: { type: String, trim: true },
    23→  passwordHash: { type: String, required: [true, 'Mật khẩu không được để trống'] },
    24→  avatar: { type: String, default: '' },
    25→  role: { type: String, enum: { values: ['customer', 'admin', 'shipper'], message: 'Role không hợp lệ' }, default: 'customer' },
    26→  addresses: [addressSchema],
    27→  wishlist: [{ type: mongoose.Schema.Types.ObjectId, ref: 'Food' }],
    28→  refreshToken: { type: String },
    29→  isActive: { type: Boolean, default: true },
    30→  vehicleInfo: { type: String, trim: true },
    31→  workingArea: { type: String, trim: true },
    32→}, { timestamps: true });
    33→
    34→// Hash password before save
    35→userSchema.pre('save', async function (next) {
    36→  if (!this.isModified('passwordHash')) return next();
    37→  // Only hash if it's not already hashed (length !== 60 for bcrypt)
    38→  if (this.passwordHash.length !== 60) {
    39→    this.passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(this.passwordHash, 12);
    40→  }
    41→  next();
    42→});
    43→
    44→// Compare password
    45→userSchema.methods.comparePassword = async function (candidatePassword) {
    46→  return bcrypt.compare(candidatePassword, this.passwordHash);
    47→};
    48→
    49→// Remove sensitive fields when converting to JSON
    50→userSchema.methods.toJSON = function () {
    51→  const obj = this.toObject();
    52→  delete obj.passwordHash;
    53→  delete obj.refreshToken;
    54→  delete obj.__v;
    55→  return obj;
    56→};
    57→
    58→// Indexes
    59→userSchema.index({ email: 1 });
    60→userSchema.index({ role: 1 });
    61→
    62→module.exports = mongoose.model('User', userSchema);
    63→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\services\socket.service.js`

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     3→
     4→function initSocket(io) {
     5→  io.on('connection', (socket) => {
     6→    // Authenticate socket connection
     7→    const token = socket.handshake.auth.token;
     8→    if (token) {
     9→      try {
    10→        const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    11→        User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken').then((user) => {
    12→          if (user) {
    13→            socket.user = user;
    14→            socket.join(`user:${user._id}`);
    15→            if (user.role === 'admin') socket.join('admin');
    16→            if (user.role === 'shipper') socket.join('shipper');
    17→            socket.emit('connected', { userId: user._id, role: user.role });
    18→          }
    19→        }).catch(() => {});
    20→      } catch {}
    21→    }
    22→
    23→    // Join room
    24→    socket.on('join', (data) => {
    25→      if (data.room) {
    26→        socket.join(data.room);
    27→      }
    28→      if (data.type === 'guest' && data.phone) {
    29→        socket.join(`guest:${data.phone}`);
    30→      }
    31→    });
    32→
    33→    // Leave room
    34→    socket.on('leave', (data) => {
    35→      if (data.room) {
    36→        socket.leave(data.room);
    37→      }
    38→    });
    39→
    40→    socket.on('disconnect', () => {});
    41→  });
    42→
    43→  return io;
    44→}
    45→
    46→module.exports = { initSocket };
    47→
```

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     3→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     4→
     5→const verifyJWT = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
     6→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
     7→  if (!token) {
     8→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Access token required. Please login.', data: null });
     9→  }
    10→
    11→  try {
    12→    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    13→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    14→    if (!user || !user.isActive) {
    15→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Invalid or inactive user', data: null });
    16→    }
    17→    req.user = user;
    18→    next();
    19→  } catch (err) {
    20→    if (err.name === 'JsonWebTokenError' || err.name === 'TokenExpiredError') {
    21→      return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Token is invalid or expired', data: null });
    22→    }
    23→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication failed', data: null });
    24→  }
    25→});
    26→
    27→const verifyRole = (...roles) => (req, res, next) => {
    28→  if (!req.user) {
    29→    return res.status(401).json({ success: false, message: 'Authentication required', data: null });
    30→  }
    31→  if (!roles.includes(req.user.role)) {
    32→    return res.status(403).json({ success: false, message: 'Insufficient permissions', data: null });
    33→  }
    34→  next();
    35→};
    36→
    37→const optionalAuth = asyncHandler(async (req, res, next) => {
    38→  const token = req.cookies?.accessToken || req.headers.authorization?.replace('Bearer ', '');
    39→  if (token) {
    40→    try {
    41→      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    42→      req.user = await User.findById(decoded.id).select('-passwordHash -refreshToken');
    43→    } catch {
    44→      // Token invalid, continue without user
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→  next();
    48→});
    49→
    50→module.exports = { verifyJWT, verifyRole, optionalAuth };
    51→
```

```text
     1→const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
     2→const asyncHandler = require('../utils/asyncHandler');
     3→const ApiResponse = require('../utils/ApiResponse');
     4→const User = require('../models/User.model');
     5→
     6→const generateAccessToken = (userId) =>
     7→  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRES_IN || '15m' });
     8→
     9→const generateRefreshToken = (userId) =>
    10→  jwt.sign({ id: userId }, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, { expiresIn: process.env.JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN || '7d' });
    11→
    12→const setTokenCookies = (res, accessToken, refreshToken) => {
    13→  res.cookie('accessToken', accessToken, {
    14→    httpOnly: true,
    15→    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    16→    sameSite: 'lax',
    17→    maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
    18→  });
    19→  res.cookie('refreshToken', refreshToken, {
    20→    httpOnly: true,
    21→    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    22→    sameSite: 'lax',
    23→    maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000,
    24→  });
    25→};
    26→
    27→// @route   POST /api/auth/register
    28→exports.register = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    29→  const { fullName, email, password, phone } = req.body;
    30→
    31→  if (!fullName || !email || !password) {
    32→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Full name, email and password are required');
    33→  }
    34→
    35→  const existing = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    36→  if (existing) {
    37→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email already registered');
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  const user = await User.create({ fullName, email, passwordHash: password, phone });
    41→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
    42→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
    43→
    44→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
    45→  await user.save();
    46→
    47→  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);
    48→
    49→  return new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Registration successful').send(res);
    50→});
    51→
    52→// @route   POST /api/auth/register-admin
    53→exports.registerAdmin = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    54→  const { fullName, email, password, phone, adminSecretKey } = req.body;
    55→
    56→  if (!fullName || !email || !password) {
    57→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Họ tên, email và mật khẩu không được để trống');
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  // Hardcoded secret key — giá trị cố định trong code
    61→  const ADMIN_SECRET = 'ADMINNHAHANGVIET';
    62→  if (!adminSecretKey || adminSecretKey !== ADMIN_SECRET) {
    63→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Mã quản trị không hợp lệ');
    64→  }
    65→
    66→  const existing = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
    67→  if (existing) {
    68→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email đã được sử dụng');
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  const user = await User.create({
    72→    fullName,
    73→    email,
    74→    passwordHash: password,
    75→    phone,
    76→    role: 'admin',
    77→  });
    78→
    79→  return new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON() }, 'Tạo tài khoản admin thành công').send(res);
    80→});
    81→
    82→// @route   POST /api/auth/register-shipper
    83→exports.registerShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    84→  const { fullName, email, password, phone, vehicleInfo, workingArea, shipperSecretKey } = req.body;
    85→
    86→  if (!fullName || !email || !password) {

    88→  }
    89→  if (!vehicleInfo || !workingArea) {
    90→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Thông tin phương tiện và khu vực hoạt động không được để trống');
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  // Hardcoded secret key — giá trị cố định trong code
    94→  const SHIPPER_SECRET = 'SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET';
    95→  if (!shipperSecretKey || shipperSecretKey !== SHIPPER_SECRET) {
    96→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Mã đăng ký shipper không hợp lệ');
    97→  }
    98→
    99→  const existing = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
   100→  if (existing) {
   101→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email đã được sử dụng');
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  const user = await User.create({
   105→    fullName,
   106→    email,

   113→
   114→  return new ApiResponse(201, { user: user.toJSON() }, 'Tạo tài khoản shipper thành công').send(res);
   115→});
   116→
   117→// @route   POST /api/auth/login
   118→exports.login = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   119→  const { email, password } = req.body;
   120→
   121→  if (!email || !password) {
   122→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Email and password are required');
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  const user = await User.findOne({ email: email.toLowerCase() });
   126→  if (!user) {
   127→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(password);
   131→  if (!isMatch) {
   132→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid email or password');
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  if (!user.isActive) {
   136→    throw new ApiResponse(403, 'Account is disabled');
   137→  }
   138→
   139→  const accessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
   140→  const refreshToken = generateRefreshToken(user._id);
   141→
   142→  user.refreshToken = refreshToken;
   143→  await user.save();
   144→
   145→  setTokenCookies(res, accessToken, refreshToken);
   146→
   147→  return new ApiResponse(200, { user: user.toJSON(), accessToken }, 'Login successful').send(res);
   148→});
   149→
   150→// @route   POST /api/auth/logout
   151→exports.logout = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   152→  if (req.user) {
   153→    await User.findByIdAndUpdate(req.user._id, { refreshToken: null });
   154→  }
   155→  res.clearCookie('accessToken');
   156→  res.clearCookie('refreshToken');
   157→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Logged out successfully').send(res);
   158→});
   159→
   160→// @route   GET /api/auth/me
   161→exports.getMe = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   162→  return new ApiResponse(200, req.user, 'User profile').send(res);
   163→});
   164→
   165→// @route   POST /api/auth/refresh
   166→exports.refreshToken = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   167→  const refreshToken = req.cookies.refreshToken || req.body.refreshToken;
   168→  if (!refreshToken) {
   169→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Refresh token required');
   170→  }
   171→
   172→  try {
   173→    const decoded = jwt.verify(refreshToken, process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET);
   174→    const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);
   175→
   176→    if (!user || user.refreshToken !== refreshToken) {
   177→      throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
   178→    }
   179→
   180→    const newAccessToken = generateAccessToken(user._id);
   181→    res.cookie('accessToken', newAccessToken, {
   182→      httpOnly: true,
   183→      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
   184→      sameSite: 'lax',
   185→      maxAge: 15 * 60 * 1000,
   186→    });
   187→
   188→    return new ApiResponse(200, { accessToken: newAccessToken }, 'Token refreshed').send(res);
   189→  } catch (err) {
   190→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Invalid refresh token');
   191→  }
   192→});
   193→
   194→// @route   PUT /api/auth/profile
   195→exports.updateProfile = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   196→  const { fullName, phone, avatar, addresses } = req.body;
   197→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   198→
   199→  if (fullName) user.fullName = fullName;
   200→  if (phone !== undefined) user.phone = phone;
   201→  if (avatar !== undefined) user.avatar = avatar;
   202→  if (addresses) user.addresses = addresses;
   203→
   204→  await user.save();
   205→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Profile updated').send(res);
   206→});
   207→
   208→// @route   PUT /api/auth/change-password
   209→exports.changePassword = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   210→  const { currentPassword, newPassword } = req.body;
   211→
   212→  if (!currentPassword || !newPassword) {
   213→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password and new password are required');
   214→  }
   215→
   216→  if (newPassword.length < 6) {
   217→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'New password must be at least 6 characters');
   218→  }
   219→
   220→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   221→  const isMatch = await user.comparePassword(currentPassword);
   222→  if (!isMatch) {
   223→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Current password is incorrect');
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  user.passwordHash = newPassword;
   227→  await user.save();
   228→
   229→  return new ApiResponse(200, null, 'Password changed successfully').send(res);
   230→});
   231→
   232→// @route   POST /api/auth/wishlist

   234→  const { foodId } = req.body;
   235→  if (!foodId) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Food ID is required');
   236→
   237→  const user = await User.findById(req.user._id);
   238→  if (!user.wishlist.includes(foodId)) {
   239→    user.wishlist.push(foodId);

   242→  return new ApiResponse(200, user.toJSON(), 'Added to wishlist').send(res);

   244→
   245→// @route   DELETE /api/auth/wishlist/:foodId
   246→exports.removeFromWishlist = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
```

```text
    10→// @route   POST /api/orders
    11→exports.createOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
    12→  const { items, customerInfo, fulfillmentType, paymentMethod, couponCode, branchId, note } = req.body;
    13→
    14→  if (!items || items.length === 0) {
    15→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Order must have at least one item');
    16→  }
    17→
    18→  if (!customerInfo?.name || !customerInfo?.phone) {
    19→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Customer name and phone are required');
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  // Calculate prices
    23→  let subtotal = 0;
    24→  const orderItems = [];
    25→
    26→  for (const item of items) {
    27→    const food = await Food.findById(item.foodId);
    28→    if (!food) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food ${item.foodId} not found`);
    29→    if (!food.isAvailable) throw new ApiResponse(400, `Food "${food.name}" is not available`);
    30→
    31→    const price = item.price || food.price;
    32→    const toppingTotal = (item.toppings || []).reduce((sum, t) => sum + (t.price || 0), 0);
    33→    subtotal += (price + toppingTotal) * item.quantity;
    34→
    35→    orderItems.push({
    36→      foodId: food._id,
    37→      foodName: food.name,
    38→      quantity: item.quantity,
    39→      price,
    40→      image: food.image || '',
    41→      variant: item.variant,
    42→      toppings: item.toppings,
    43→    });
    44→
    45→    // Update sold count
    46→    await Food.findByIdAndUpdate(food._id, { $inc: { soldCount: item.quantity } });
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  // Validate and apply coupon
    50→  let discount = 0;
    51→  let coupon = null;
    52→
    53→  if (couponCode) {
    54→    coupon = await Coupon.findOne({ code: couponCode.toUpperCase(), isActive: true });
    55→    if (!coupon) throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Invalid coupon code');
    56→    if (coupon.startDate > new Date() || coupon.endDate < new Date()) {
    57→      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon has expired or not yet active');
    58→    }
    59→    if (coupon.totalLimit && coupon.usedCount >= coupon.totalLimit) {
    60→      throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Coupon usage limit reached');
    61→    }
    62→    if (subtotal < coupon.minOrder) {
    63→      throw new ApiResponse(400, `Minimum order ${coupon.minOrder.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ required`);
    64→    }
    65→    if (coupon.type === 'percent') {
    66→      discount = Math.min((subtotal * coupon.value) / 100, coupon.maxDiscount || Infinity);
    67→    } else {
    68→      discount = Math.min(coupon.value, subtotal);
    69→    }
    70→    await Coupon.findByIdAndUpdate(coupon._id, { $inc: { usedCount: 1 } });
    71→  }
    72→
    73→  const deliveryFee =
    74→    fulfillmentType === 'delivery'
    75→      ? subtotal - discount >= 100000
    76→        ? 0
    77→        : 15000
    78→      : 0;
    79→
    80→  const total = Math.max(0, subtotal - discount + deliveryFee);
    81→
    82→  const order = await Booking.create({
    83→    customer: req.user?._id,
    84→    items: orderItems,
    85→    subtotal,
    86→    discount,
    87→    deliveryFee,
    88→    total,
    89→    coupon: coupon?._id,
    90→    paymentMethod: paymentMethod || 'cod',
    91→    fulfillmentType: fulfillmentType || 'delivery',
    92→    branch: branchId,
    93→    customerInfo,
    94→    note,
    95→    trackingLogs: [{ status: 'pending', note: 'Order placed', timestamp: new Date() }],
    96→  });
    97→
    98→  // Notify admins via Socket.io
    99→  const io = req.app.get('io');
   100→  if (io) {
   101→    io.to('admin').emit('newOrder', { order });
   102→  }
   103→
   104→  // Create notification for admins
   105→  await Notification.create({
   106→    user: null,
   107→    title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
   108→    message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} vừa được đặt - ${total.toLocaleString('vi-VN')}đ`,
   109→    type: 'order',
   110→    link: `/admin/orders/${order._id}`,
   111→  });
   112→
   113→  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   114→    .populate('coupon', 'code type value')
   115→    .populate('branch', 'name address phone');
   116→
   117→  return new ApiResponse(201, populated, 'Order placed successfully').send(res);
   118→});

   120→// @route   GET /api/orders/my
   121→exports.getMyOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   122→  const { status, page = 1, limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit } = req.query;
   123→
   124→  const query = {};
   125→  if (req.user) {
   126→    query.customer = req.user._id;
   127→  } else {
   128→    throw new ApiResponse(401, 'Authentication required');
   129→  }
   130→  if (status) query.status = status;
   131→
   132→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
   133→
   134→  const [orders, total] = await Promise.all([

   138→      .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   139→      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
   140→      .skip(skip)
   141→      .limit(Number(limit)),
   142→    Booking.countDocuments(query),

   148→  }, 'Orders retrieved').send(res);

   170→exports.updateOrderStatus = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   171→  const { status, note, cancelReason } = req.body;
   172→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
   173→
   174→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   175→
   176→  const validTransitions = {
   177→    pending: ['confirmed', 'cancelled'],
   178→    confirmed: ['preparing', 'cancelled'],
   179→    preparing: ['delivering', 'cancelled'],
   180→    delivering: ['done', 'cancelled'],
   181→    done: [],
   182→    cancelled: [],
   183→  };
   184→
   185→  if (!validTransitions[order.status]?.includes(status)) {
   186→    throw new ApiResponse(400, `Cannot change status from "${order.status}" to "${status}"`);
   187→  }
   188→
   189→  order.status = status;
   190→  order.trackingLogs.push({
   191→    status,
   192→    note: note || `Status changed to ${status}`,
   193→    timestamp: new Date(),
   194→    updatedBy: req.user?.fullName || 'System',
   195→  });
   196→
   197→  if (cancelReason) order.cancelReason = cancelReason;
   198→
   199→  await order.save();
   200→
   201→  // Notify customer
   202→  if (order.customer) {
   203→    await Notification.create({
   204→      user: order.customer,
   205→      title: 'Cập nhật đơn hàng',
   206→      message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được cập nhật: ${status}`,
   207→      type: 'order',
   208→      link: `/orders/${order._id}`,
   209→    });
   210→
   211→    // Socket.io to customer
   212→    const io = req.app.get('io');
   213→    if (io) {
   214→      io.to(`user:${order.customer}`).emit('orderUpdate', { orderId: order._id, status, orderCode: order.orderCode });
   215→    }
   216→  }
   217→
   218→  // Notify assigned shipper
   219→  if (order.assignedShipper && status === 'confirmed') {
   220→    const shipper = await User.findById(order.assignedShipper);
   221→    if (shipper) {
   222→      await Notification.create({
   223→        user: order.assignedShipper,
   224→        title: 'Đơn hàng mới',
   225→        message: `Đơn hàng ${order.orderCode} đã được xác nhận. Sẵn sàng giao!`,
   226→        type: 'order',
   227→        link: `/shipper/orders/${order._id}`,
   228→      });
   229→    }
   230→  }
   231→
   232→  const populated = await Booking.findById(order._id)
   233→    .populate('coupon', 'code')
   234→    .populate('branch', 'name address')
   235→    .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   236→    .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone');

   242→exports.assignShipper = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   243→  const { shipperId } = req.body;
   244→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
   245→
   246→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   247→  if (!['pending', 'confirmed'].includes(order.status)) {

   251→  order.assignedShipper = shipperId;

   267→    const io = req.app.get('io');
   268→    if (io) {
   269→      io.to(`user:${shipperId}`).emit('newDelivery', { _id: order._id, orderCode: order.orderCode });
   270→      io.to('shipper').emit('orderAssigned', { _id: order._id, orderCode: order.orderCode });
   271→    }
   272→  }
   273→
   274→  return new ApiResponse(200, populated, 'Shipper assigned').send(res);
   275→});

   277→// @route   PATCH /api/orders/:id/cancel
   278→exports.cancelOrder = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   279→  const { reason } = req.body;
   280→  const order = await Booking.findById(req.params.id);
   281→
   282→  if (!order) throw new ApiResponse(404, 'Order not found');
   283→  if (['done', 'cancelled'].includes(order.status)) {
   284→    throw new ApiResponse(400, 'Cannot cancel this order');
   285→  }
   286→
   287→  order.status = 'cancelled';
   288→  order.cancelReason = reason || 'Cancelled by customer';
   289→  order.trackingLogs.push({
   290→    status: 'cancelled',
   291→    note: reason || 'Cancelled by customer',
   292→    timestamp: new Date(),
   293→    updatedBy: req.user?.fullName || 'Customer',
   294→  });
   295→  await order.save();

   297→  if (order.customer) {

   302→      type: 'order',
   303→    });
   304→
   305→    const io = req.app.get('io');

   311→  return new ApiResponse(200, order, 'Order cancelled').send(res);

   315→exports.getAllOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   316→  const { status, search, page = 1, limit = PAGINATION_DEFAULTS.defaultLimit } = req.query;
   317→
   318→  const query = {};
   319→  if (status && status !== 'all') query.status = status;
   320→  if (search) {
   321→    query.$or = [
   322→      { orderCode: { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
   323→      { 'customerInfo.name': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
   324→      { 'customerInfo.phone': { $regex: search, $options: 'i' } },
   325→    ];
   326→  }
   327→
   328→  const skip = (Number(page) - 1) * Number(limit);
   329→
   330→  const [orders, total] = await Promise.all([

   332→      .populate('customer', 'fullName email phone avatar')
   333→      .populate('assignedShipper', 'fullName phone avatar')
   334→      .populate('branch', 'name address')
   335→      .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
   336→      .skip(skip)
   337→      .limit(Number(limit)),
   338→    Booking.countDocuments(query),
   339→  ]);
   340→
   341→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
   342→    orders,
   343→    pagination: { total, page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), pages: Math.ceil(total / Number(limit)) },
   344→  }, 'Orders retrieved').send(res);
   345→});
   346→
   347→// @route   GET /api/orders/shipper/pending (shipper)
   348→exports.getShipperOrders = asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
   349→  const { status } = req.query;
   350→  const query = {};
   351→
   352→  if (req.user.role === 'shipper') {
   353→    query.assignedShipper = req.user._id;
   354→  }
   355→  if (status) query.status = status;
   356→
   357→  const orders = await Booking.find(query)
   358→    .populate('customer', 'fullName phone')
   359→    .populate('branch', 'name address')
   360→    .sort({ createdAt: -1 })
   361→    .limit(50);
   362→
   363→  // Compute stats
   364→  const today = new Date();
   365→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   366→
   367→  const [pending, delivering, completedToday] = await Promise.all([
   368→    Booking.countDocuments({ ...query, status: { $in: ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing'] } }),
   369→    Booking.countDocuments({ ...query, status: 'delivering' }),
   370→    Booking.countDocuments({
   371→      ...query,
   372→      status: 'done',
   373→      updatedAt: { $gte: today },
   374→    }),
   375→  ]);
   376→
   377→  return new ApiResponse(200, {
   378→    orders,
   379→    stats: { pending, delivering, completedToday },
   380→  }, 'Shipper orders retrieved').send(res);
   381→});
```

```text
    65→const slugify = (text) =>
    66→  text
    67→    .toLowerCase()
    68→    .replace(/[àáạảãâầấậẩẫăằắặẳẵ]/g, 'a')
    69→    .replace(/[èéẹẻẽêềếệểễ]/g, 'e')

    71→    .replace(/[òóọỏõôồốộổỗơờớợởỡ]/g, 'o')
    72→    .replace(/[ùúụủũưừứựửữ]/g, 'u')
    73→    .replace(/[ỳýỵỷỹ]/g, 'y')
    74→    .replace(/[đ]/g, 'd')
    75→    .replace(/[^\w\s-]/g, '')
    76→    .replace(/[\s_-]+/g, '-')
    77→    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');

    90→      Branch.deleteMany({}),
    91→      Review.deleteMany({}),
    92→    ]);
    93→    console.log('   ✓ Đã xóa dữ liệu cũ');
    94→
    95→    // Seed users
    96→    await User.insertMany(seedUsers);
    97→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedUsers.length} users (admin, shipper, customers)`);
    98→
    99→    // Seed foods (create one by one to trigger pre-save hooks for slug)
   100→    const foods = [];
   101→    for (const foodData of seedFoods) {
   102→      const food = new Food(foodData);
   103→      if (!food.slug) {
   104→        food.slug = slugify(food.name);
   105→      }
   106→      await food.save();
   107→      foods.push(food);
   108→    }
   109→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${foods.length} món ăn`);
   110→
   111→    // Seed coupons
   112→    await Coupon.insertMany(seedCoupons);
   113→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedCoupons.length} coupons`);
   114→
   115→    // Seed branches
   116→    await Branch.insertMany(seedBranches);
   117→    console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${seedBranches.length} chi nhánh`);
   118→
   119→    // Seed some reviews
   120→    const adminUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'admin' });
   121→    const customerUser = await User.findOne({ role: 'customer' });
   122→    const reviews = [];
   123→    if (foods.length > 0 && customerUser) {
   124→      for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(foods.length, 10); i++) {
   125→        reviews.push({
   126→          user: customerUser._id,
   127→          food: foods[i]._id,
   128→          rating: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2) + 4,
   129→          comment: ['Món ăn ngon lắm!', 'Giao hàng nhanh, đồ ăn còn nóng.', 'Rất hài lòng, sẽ order lại.', 'Chất lượng tuyệt vời!', 'Giá cả hợp lý, sẽ giới thiệu bạn bè.'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)],
   130→          isVerified: true,
   131→        });
   132→      }
   133→      await Review.insertMany(reviews);
   134→      console.log(`   ✓ Đã seed ${reviews.length} reviews`);
   135→    }
   136→
   137→    console.log('\n✅ Seed hoàn tất!');
   138→    console.log('\n📋 Tài khoản test:');
   139→    console.log('   Admin:   admin@nhavien.com / admin123');

   142→
   143→    process.exit(0);
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./\backend\src\middlewares\rateLimiter.middleware.js`

```text
     1→const rateLimitStore = new Map();
     2→
     3→const rateLimiter = (options = {}) => {
     4→  const { windowMs = 15 * 60 * 1000, max = 100, message = 'Too many requests' } = options;
     5→
     6→  return (req, res, next) => {
     7→    const key = req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress;
     8→    const now = Date.now();
     9→
    10→    if (!rateLimitStore.has(key)) {
    11→      rateLimitStore.set(key, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
    12→      return next();
    13→    }
    14→
    15→    const record = rateLimitStore.get(key);
    16→
    17→    if (now > record.resetTime) {
    18→      rateLimitStore.set(key, { count: 1, resetTime: now + windowMs });
    19→      return next();
    20→    }
    21→
    22→    record.count++;
    23→
    24→    if (record.count > max) {
    25→      return res.status(429).json({
    26→        success: false,
    27→        message,
    28→        data: null,
    29→      });
    30→    }
    31→
    32→    next();
    33→  };
    34→};
    35→
    36→// Cleanup old entries periodically
    37→setInterval(() => {
    38→  const now = Date.now();
    39→  for (const [key, value] of rateLimitStore.entries()) {
    40→    if (now > value.resetTime) {
    41→      rateLimitStore.delete(key);
    42→    }
    43→  }
    44→}, 60000);
    45→
    46→module.exports = rateLimiter;
    47→
```
</details></tool-use>

Here is the comprehensive overview of the project:

---

## Project: Restaurant Booking & Menu Manager (Nhà Hàng Việt)

### 1. What is this project about?

This is a full-stack restaurant management and food ordering system (Hệ thống đặt món và quản lý nhà hàng). It supports:
- **Customer side**: Browse menu, search/filter foods, cart management, checkout, order history, order tracking, wishlist, user profile
- **Admin side**: Dashboard with stats, CRUD food management, order management, user management, promo/coupon management, branch management
- **Shipper side**: Dashboard, assigned orders, delivery history
- **Real-time features**: Socket.io for live order notifications, status updates, and delivery assignments
- **Multi-role auth**: JWT-based authentication with customer, admin, and shipper roles

### 2. Overall Structure

```
Res-booking/
├── README.md
├── package.json           # Root: concurrently script to run both services
├── backend/               # Node.js + Express API server
│   ├── .env               # Environment config (dev)
│   ├── .env.example
│   ├── package.json
│   └── src/
│       ├── server.js          # Entry point (HTTP + Socket.io)
│       ├── app.js             # Express app (routes, middleware, CORS)
│       ├── config/
│       │   └── database.js    # MongoDB connection
│       ├── models/            # 9 Mongoose models
│       ├── controllers/       # 11 controllers
│       ├── routes/            # 11 route files
│       ├── middleware/        # Legacy: errorHandler, upload
│       ├── middlewares/       # Auth, rate limiter
│       ├── services/          # Socket.io service
│       ├── utils/             # asyncHandler, ApiResponse, constants, seed
│       └── uploads/           # Local file storage for images
└── frontend/              # React + Vite client
    ├── package.json
    ├── vite.config.js    # Dev proxy to backend:5000
    ├── tailwind.config.js
    ├── index.html
    ├── public/
    ├── dist/             # Production build output
    └── src/
        ├── main.jsx         # React root with Redux Provider + Socket init
        ├── App.jsx          # Router, dark mode, socket connection
        ├── store/           # Redux store (5 slices)
        ├── routes/index.jsx # All route definitions (Main, Admin, Shipper layouts)
        ├── layouts/         # MainLayout, AdminLayout, ShipperLayout
        ├── pages/           # 18 pages (user, admin, shipper)
        ├── components/ui/   # 13 reusable UI components
        ├── features/        # Feature-specific components (FoodCard, BookingActions, etc.)
        ├── slices/          # 6 Redux slices (foods, cart, orders, auth, notifications)
        ├── api/             # Axios client
        ├── lib/             # Socket client, utilities
        ├── hooks/
        ├── constants/
        ├── utils/
        └── index.css
```

### 3. Technologies & Frameworks

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| **Backend runtime** | Node.js >= 18 |
| **Backend framework** | Express.js 4.x |
| **Database** | MongoDB (Mongoose 8.x) |
| **Auth** | JWT (access token 15m, refresh token 7d) + bcryptjs |
| **Real-time** | Socket.io 4.x |
| **Image upload** | Multer (disk storage, 5MB limit) |
| **Security** | Helmet, CORS, custom rate limiter (in-memory) |
| **Validation** | Zod (backend), react-hook-form + Yup (frontend) |
| **Logging** | Winston |
| **Frontend framework** | React 18 + Vite 6 |
| **State management** | Redux Toolkit (RTK) |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS 3.x (custom theme: primary orange, green secondary, amber accent) |
| **Routing** | React Router DOM 6 |
| **HTTP client** | Axios |
| **UI animations** | Framer Motion |
| **Charts** | Recharts (admin dashboard) |
| **Icons** | Lucide React |
| **Notifications** | react-hot-toast (Sonner) |
| **Build orchestration** | concurrently (root package.json) |

### 4. Main Features & Modules

#### Backend (9 API route groups, 11 controllers)

- **Auth** (`/api/auth`): Register (customer/admin/shipper), login, logout, refresh token, profile CRUD, wishlist management. Admin and shipper registration use hardcoded secret keys (`ADMINNHAHANGVIET`, `SHIPPERNHAHANGVIET`).
- **Foods** (`/api/foods`): Full CRUD with search (regex on name), category filter, sort (price_asc/desc, newest), pagination. Foods have variants, toppings, tags, discount, ratings, sold count, and slug auto-generation.
- **Orders / Bookings** (`/api/orders`): Create order (with coupon validation, delivery fee logic, stock updates), customer order history, order detail, status updates with valid state transitions, shipper assignment, cancellation. Auto-generates `ORD{timestamp}{sequence}` order codes.
- **Reviews** (`/api/reviews`): Create/delete reviews; auto-updates `Food.ratingAverage` and `Food.ratingCount` via Mongoose post-hooks.
- **Coupons** (`/api/coupons`): CRUD for admin; public validation endpoint. Supports percent or fixed discounts, min order, max discount cap, usage limits, date ranges, free shipping.
- **Branches** (`/api/branches`): Public listing; admin CRUD with geo coordinates.
- **Notifications** (`/api/notifications`): Per-user notifications for orders, promos, system events.
- **Admin** (`/api/admin`): Overview stats (revenue, top foods, categories), user management, shipper listing.
- **Upload** (`/api/upload`): Single image upload via Multer.

#### Frontend (18 pages across 3 layouts)

**User layout:**
- Home (food grid with search, category filter, sort, pagination)
- Food Detail (gallery, variants, toppings, reviews, add to cart/wishlist)
- Cart (quantity management)
- Checkout (coupon, branch selection, fulfillment type, payment method)
- Login / Register (3 roles)
- Profile (addresses, password change)
- Order History / Order Tracking (live status updates via Socket.io)
- Wishlist
- Notifications

**Admin layout:**
- Dashboard (revenue charts, top foods, stats)
- Foods Management (CRUD table, real image upload)
- Orders Management (status updates, shipper assignment)
- Users Management
- Promos / Coupons Management
- Branches Management

**Shipper layout:**
- Dashboard (pending orders, stats)
- Order History

### 5. Git & Pipeline Status

- **NOT a git repository** -- no `.git/` directory exists.
- **No CI/CD pipeline files** -- no GitHub Actions (`.github/`), no `.yml`/`.yaml` workflow files, no `Jenkinsfile`, etc.
- **IDE config only**: `.vscode/settings.json` and `.claude/settings.local.json` (Claude Opus config).
- **Seed data**: The project includes a comprehensive seed script (`backend/src/utils/seed.js`) that creates 5 users, 26 food items, 5 coupons, 6 branches, and sample reviews.

### Test Accounts (from seed data)

| Role | Email | Password |
|------|-------|----------|
| Admin | `admin@nhavien.com` | `admin123` |
| Shipper | `shipper@nhavien.com` | `shipper123` |
| Customer | `user1@nhavien.com` | `user1234` |

### Notable Code Observations

- **Dual model naming**: The backend has both old models (e.g., `Food.js`, `Booking.js`) and new `.model.js` versions (e.g., `Food.model.js`, `Booking.model.js`). The `app.js` imports routes from the newer modules, but the old ones are still present.
- **JWT secret keys** are defined in `.env` but the `.env.example` includes them as defaults. Access token expires in 15 minutes.
- **In-memory rate limiter**: Uses a plain `Map` with periodic cleanup (60-second interval), not a Redis-backed store.
- **Socket.io rooms**: Users join `user:{id}` rooms, admins join `admin`, shippers join `shipper`. Events include `newOrder`, `orderUpdate`, `newDelivery`, `orderAssigned`.
- **The `Booking` model (v2) is actually used for orders** -- the older `Booking.js` model uses different field names and a simpler schema. The active system uses `Booking.model.js` as the Order model.

```yaml
name: CI / Build & Test

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  lint-backend:
    name: Lint Backend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: backend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: backend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint
        continue-on-error: true

  lint-frontend:
    name: Lint Frontend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: frontend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint
        continue-on-error: true

  test-backend:
    name: Test Backend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: backend
    env:
      NODE_ENV: test
      MONGODB_URI: ${{ secrets.MONGODB_URI }}
      JWT_SECRET: ${{ secrets.JWT_SECRET }}
      JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${{ secrets.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: backend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: true

  build-frontend:
    name: Build Frontend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: frontend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
        env:
          VITE_API_URL: ${{ secrets.VITE_API_URL }}

  build-backend:
    name: Build Backend
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: backend
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'
          cache-dependency-path: backend/package-lock.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build
        continue-on-error: true

```

```yaml
name: ✨ Feature Request
description: Đề xuất tính năng mới cho hệ thống
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ## Mô tả tính năng
        Mô tả ngắn gọn tính năng bạn muốn thêm vào hệ thống.

  - type: textarea
    id: problem
    attributes:
      label: Vấn đề / Nhu cầu
      description: Tại sao tính năng này cần thiết? Nó giải quyết vấn đề gì?
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: textarea
    id: solution
    attributes:
      label: Giải pháp đề xuất
      description: Mô tả cách tính năng nên hoạt động
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: dropdown
    id: priority
    attributes:
      label: Mức ưu tiên
      options:
        - Low - Ít quan trọng, có thể trì hoãn
        - Medium - Quan trọng, cần làm sớm
        - High - Rất quan trọng, cần làm ngay
        - Critical - Khẩn cấp, bug hoặc blocking
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: dropdown
    id: module
    attributes:
      label: Module / Phần liên quan
      options:
        - Frontend - UI/UX
        - Backend - API/Logic
        - Database - Schema/Data
        - Full-stack - Cả frontend và backend
        - DevOps - CI/CD/Infra
        - Documentation
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: textarea
    id: scope
    attributes:
      label: Phạm vi (Optional)
      description: |
        - **In scope**: Những gì tính năng bao gồm
        - **Out of scope**: Những gì KHÔNG bao gồm
      placeholder: |
        ### In scope
        - ...

        ### Out of scope
        - ...
    validations:
      required: false

  - type: textarea
    id: acceptance
    attributes:
      label: Acceptance Criteria
      description: Danh sách checklist để biết tính năng đã hoàn thành
      placeholder: |
        - [ ] ...
        - [ ] ...
        - [ ] ...
    validations:
      required: false

```

```yaml
name: 🐛 Bug Report
description: Báo lỗi trong hệ thống
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ## Mô tả lỗi
        Mô tả ngắn gọn lỗi bạn gặp phải.

  - type: textarea
    id: description
    attributes:
      label: Mô tả lỗi
      description: Mô tả chi tiết lỗi, bao gồm những gì xảy ra và những gì bạn mong đợi
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: textarea
    id: steps
    attributes:
      label: Các bước để reproduce
      description: Liệt kê các bước để tái hiện lỗi
      placeholder: |
        1. Go to '...'
        2. Click on '...'
        3. Scroll down to '...'
        4. See error
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: textarea
    id: expected
    attributes:
      label: Kết quả mong đợi
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: textarea
    id: actual
    attributes:
      label: Kết quả thực tế
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: dropdown
    id: severity
    attributes:
      label: Mức độ nghiêm trọng
      options:
        - Low - Lỗi nhỏ, không ảnh hưởng nhiều
        - Medium - Lỗi ảnh hưởng đến workflow nhưng có workaround
        - High - Lỗi nghiêm trọng, ảnh hưởng lớn đến user
        - Critical - Hệ thống không thể hoạt động
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: dropdown
    id: module
    attributes:
      label: Module / Phần liên quan
      options:
        - Frontend - UI/UX
        - Backend - API/Logic
        - Database - Schema/Data
        - Auth - Đăng nhập/Phân quyền
        - Payment - Thanh toán
        - Real-time - Socket.io
    validations:
      required: true

  - type: textarea
    id: environment
    attributes:
      label: Environment (Optional)
      description: |
        - OS: ...
        - Browser: ...
        - Node.js version: ...
        - Các thông tin khác

```

Đã setup xong! Đây là tóm tắt những gì đã làm:

---

## Tổng quan dự án

**Hệ thống đặt món & quản lý nhà hàng** — full-stack React + Node.js/Express + MongoDB + Socket.io.

- **3 vai trò**: Customer, Admin, Shipper
- **18 trang frontend**, 11 nhóm API backend
- **Tài khoản test**: `admin@nhavien.com / admin123`, `shipper@nhavien.com / shipper123`, `user1@nhavien.com / user1234`

---

## Đã setup workflow "Get Things Done"

### 1. Git Repository
- Đã init git, 2 commits đầu tiên trên branch `main`

### 2. GitHub Actions CI (`ci.yml`)
Trigger trên push (main, develop) và PR về main:
- **Lint Backend** — ESLint code backend
- **Lint Frontend** — ESLint code React
- **Test Backend** — placeholder test (chạy khi có tests)
- **Build Frontend** — `vite build`
- **Build Backend** — placeholder build

### 3. GitHub Issue Templates
- **Feature Request** — với trường: priority (Low/Medium/High/Critical), module (Frontend/Backend/DB/Full-stack/DevOps/Docs), acceptance criteria
- **Bug Report** — với trường: severity (Low/Medium/High/Critical), reproduction steps, module

### 4. PR Template
- Checklist: conventional commits, self-review, test cases, no debug code, docs update

### 5. ESLint + Scripts
- Backend: `npm run lint`, `npm run lint:fix`, `npm run test`
- Frontend: `npm run lint`, `npm run lint:fix`, `npm run test`

---

## Tiếp theo

Bạn muốn làm gì? Ví dụ:
- **Push lên GitHub** để kích hoạt CI?
- **Thêm tính năng mới**? (mô tả tính năng, tôi sẽ tạo issue, branch, và implement)
- **Viết unit tests** cho backend?
- **Xem danh sách issues/tasks** hiện tại?

    34→## Yêu cầu
    35→
    36→- Node.js >= 18
    37→- MongoDB (local) đang chạy
    38→- npm hoặc yarn
    39→
    40→---
    41→
    42→## Cài đặt
    43→
    44→### 1. Cài đặt tất cả dependencies
    45→
    46→```bash
    47→# Từ thư mục gốc
    48→cd bt-quanlibooking
    49→
    50→# Backend
    51→cd backend
    52→npm install
    53→
    54→# Frontend
    55→cd ../frontend
    56→npm install
    57→
    58→# Hoặc chạy 1 lệnh từ thư mục gốc:
    59→npm run install:all
    60→```
    61→
    62→### 2. Cấu hình MongoDB
    63→
    64→Đảm bảo MongoDB đang chạy ở `localhost:27017`. Database name: `quanli_booking`.
    65→
    66→File cấu hình: `backend/.env`
    67→
    68→```
    69→PORT=5000
    70→MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/quanli_booking
    71→NODE_ENV=development
    72→```
    73→
    74→---
    75→
    76→## Chạy project
    77→
    78→### 1. Seed dữ liệu (chạy 1 lần)
    79→
    80→```bash
    81→cd backend
    82→npm run seed
    83→```
    84→
    85→Kết quả: Tạo 6 món ăn + 1 booking mẫu.
    86→
    87→### 2. Khởi động
    88→
    89→**Cách 1 — Chạy riêng từng phần:**
    90→
    91→```bash
    92→# Terminal 1: Backend
    93→cd backend
    94→npm run dev
    95→# Chạy tại http://localhost:5000
    96→
    97→# Terminal 2: Frontend
    98→cd frontend
    99→npm run dev
   100→# Chạy tại http://localhost:5173
   101→```
   102→
   103→**Cách 2 — Chạy cùng lúc (cần concurrently):**
   104→
   105→```bash
   106→npm run dev
   107→```
   108→
   109→---
   110→
   111→## Routes
   112→
   113→### Phía khách hàng
   114→| Route | Mô tả |
   115→|-------|-------|
   116→| `/` | Trang chủ — danh sách món ăn |
   117→| `/foods/:id` | Chi tiết món ăn |
   118→| `/cart` | Giỏ hàng |
   119→| `/checkout` | Xác nhận đặt món |
   120→
   121→### Phía quản trị
   122→| Route | Mô tả |
   123→|-------|-------|
   124→| `/admin` | Dashboard tổng quan |
   125→| `/admin/foods` | Quản lý món ăn (CRUD) |
   126→| `/admin/bookings` | Quản lý booking |
   127→
   128→---
   129→
   130→## API Endpoints
   131→
   132→### Foods
   133→- `GET /api/foods` — Danh sách (search, category, sort, page, limit)
   134→- `GET /api/foods/:id` — Chi tiết
   135→- `POST /api/foods` — Tạo mới
   136→- `PUT /api/foods/:id` — Cập nhật
   137→- `DELETE /api/foods/:id` — Xóa
   138→
   139→### Bookings
   140→- `GET /api/bookings` — Danh sách (filter status)
   141→- `GET /api/bookings/:id` — Chi tiết
   142→- `POST /api/bookings` — Tạo booking
   143→- `PATCH /api/bookings/:id/status` — Cập nhật trạng thái
   144→
   145→### Upload
   146→- `POST /api/upload` — Upload ảnh (multipart/form-data)
   147→
   148→---
   149→
   150→## Các lỗi thường gặp
   151→
   152→### 1. MongoDB not connected
   153→```
   154→❌ MongoDB Error: ...
   155→```
   156→→ Kiểm tra MongoDB đã chạy chưa: `mongod`
   157→→ Kiểm tra `MONGODB_URI` trong `.env`
   158→
   159→### 2. CORS error
   160→→ Backend đang chạn port 5000, frontend chạy 5173
   161→→ Đã cấu hình CORS trong `backend/src/app.js`
   162→
   163→### 3. Upload ảnh lỗi
   164→→ Đảm bảo thư mục `backend/src/uploads` tồn tại
   165→
   166→### 4. Ảnh không hiển thị
   167→→ Ảnh local chưa có → dùng placeholder từ Unsplash
   168→→ Đường dẫn ảnh fallback trong code
   169→
   170→### 5. Seed lỗi
   171→```
   172→❌ Lỗi seed: ...
   173→```
   174→→ Chạy `npm run seed` khi backend đã chạy và MongoDB đã kết nối
   175→
   176→---
   177→
   178→## Lệnh nhanh
   179→
   180→```bash
   181→# Seed dữ liệu
   182→npm run seed
   183→
   184→# Chạy backend
   185→npm run server
   186→
   187→# Chạy frontend
   188→npm run client
   189→
   190→# Chạy cả 2
   191→npm run dev
   192→```
   193→🎉 Project: Restaurant Booking & Menu Manager
   194→
   195→  Đã hoàn thành
   196→
   197→  Backend (Node.js + Express + MongoDB)
   198→  - 6 món ăn seed sẵn + 1 booking mẫu
   199→  - API đầy đủ: Foods CRUD, Bookings CRUD, Upload ảnh
   200→  - Đang chạy tại: http://localhost:5000
   201→
   202→  Frontend (React + Vite + Tailwind + Redux)
   203→  - Build thành công, đang chạy tại: http://localhost:5173
   204→  - 4 trang user: Trang chủ, Chi tiết món, Giỏ hàng, Checkout
   205→  - 3 trang admin: Dashboard, Quản lý món ăn, Quản lý booking
   206→  - UI hiện đại, responsive với Tailwind CSS
   207→
   208→  ---

   223→
   224→  Trạng thái
   225→
   226→  ┌─────────────┬───────────────────────┐
   227→  │   Service   │          URL          │
   228→  ├─────────────┼───────────────────────┤

   237→
   238→  - Grid/Table view món ăn với search, filter category, sort
